forecast.description: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers and Thunderstorms. Heat index exceeds 105°F. Extreme Heat Warning through 8pm.
Chance Showers and Thunderstorms. Still dangerously hot at 95°F with significant storm risk.
Showers and Thunderstorms Likely. Scorching Independence Day with 91°F high and scattered storms.
Showers and Thunderstorms Likely. Slight cooling relief to 87°F but storm risk continues.
Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers. Heat continues but extreme warning lifted.
Slight Chance Rain Showers. Hot at 88°F with improving conditions.
Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers. Warm at 86°F, gradually improving outlook.

recommendations.reason: Entire week unsafe for outdoor cycling. Thu under Extreme Heat Warning (heat index 105°F+). Fri–Sun still 87–95°F with 63–72% thunderstorm risk. Mon–Wed still 86–88°F. No outdoor cycling this week.
Extreme Heat Warning today (heat index 105°F). Fri–Sun still 87–95°F with heavy storm risk. Mon–Wed 86–88°F remains dangerous for outdoor running. Use YMCA treadmill all week.
Indoor pool at YMCA always available (5:30am–9pm weekdays, 7am–6pm weekends). Especially welcome during extreme heat week.
Strongly recommended all week — Extreme Heat Warning today, continued heat and storms Fri–Sun, still 86–88°F Mon–Wed. YMCA at 400 W Washington St open 5:30am–9pm weekdays.
